dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9236 IH: High-risk Alert Improvement for Locating Endangered Youth Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Yakym introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend the PROTECT Act to include minimum standards for issuing an alert for a high-risk missing person, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the High-risk Alert Improvement for Locating Endangered Youth Act of 2026 or the HAILEY Act of 2026.

section.header: Minimum standards for issuance and dissemination of alerts through AMBER Alert communications network
section.text: Section 302(a) of the PROTECT Act (34 U.S.C. 20502(a)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (2), by striking the period and inserting ; and; and
by adding at the end the following:
the issuance of alerts through the AMBER Alert Communication network for individuals—

subparagraph.text: that law enforcement reasonably believes is a high-risk missing person.
